center.name: 东帝汶
center.summary: 东帝汶是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括绿棉凫、爪哇灰鴨、Plumed egret等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Indonesia and East Timor

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: boobook), native to Australia, Timor-Leste and New Guinea, something that endured for more than two hundred years, until 1999

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The plumed egret is found in Australasia and breeds in eastern Indonesia, Timor-Leste, New Guinea and Australia,{{cite journal |author1=Adrian Walsh |author2=Chris J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-cheeked parrot is found in Cape York Peninsula, Australia, Indonesia, East Timor, and Papua New Guinea and several other islands in the region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The spotted harrier is native to Australia and Indonesia, however vagrant populations have been seen in Timor-Leste

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It can be found in the countries of Indonesia and East Timor

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is reported as also being found in East Timor by some authors, but the species has only been recorded on the western half of the island, in spite of suitable habitat.{{cite journal |last1=Trainor |first1=C.R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-crested cockatoo is found in wooded and cultivated areas of East Timor and Indonesia's islands of Sulawesi and the Lesser Sundas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in central and southern China, and the northern extremes of Myanmar and Vietnam. It occurs in the countries of Bhutan, China, India, Indonesia, Laos, Malaysia, Myanmar, Nepal, Philippines, Thailand, Timor-Leste and Vietnam and also may occur in northeastern and southeastern Bangladesh

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pale-headed munia (Lonchura pallida) is a species of estrildid finch native to eastern Indonesia and Timor-Leste

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Sunda teal (Anas gibberifrons), also known as the Bebek cokelat or Itik benjut, is a dabbling duck found in open wetlands in Indonesia and Timor-Leste

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Indonesia and East Timor

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green pygmy goose is found in southern New Guinea and across northern Australia (from Western Australia, through Northern Territory and into Queensland). To the west, it commonly reaches Timor-Leste, where it possibly breeds at Lake Iralalara. It is largely resident, apart from dispersion in the wet season

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-faced munia (Lonchura molucca) is a species of estrildid finch found in Indonesia and East Timor
